data.body: New file src/lib/beads-state-machine.ts with nextBeat() and claimBeat(). nextBeat: load beat, verify expectedState, compute forward transition, update via getBackend().update(). claimBeat: verify queued+claimable, transition to active. Error messages must contain 'expected state' and 'currently' for isExpectedStateMismatchError() compat.
data.title: Phase 2: Beads state machine module
